name: HRM_OWNER_HISTORY
description: Plan candidate history table stores the history records of the owner. It contains history data with old and new values.

columns.Name: PLAN_OWNER_HISTORY_ID
columns.Comments: Plan owner history id is unique id to represent the history record of candidate.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise id represents enterprise id for plan.

columns.Name: PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Plan id represents plan in which owner belongs to.

columns.Name: PLAN_OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: Plan owner id represents the unique id for owner in plan.

columns.Name: MODIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: modified date represents the date on which this change is committed.

columns.Name: MODIFIED_BY
columns.Comments: modified by represents the person id who made this change.

columns.Name: MODIFIED_COLUMN
columns.Comments: Modified column represents the name of modified column.

columns.Name: OLD_VALUE
columns.Comments: Old value represents the old value of what changed attribute.

columns.Name: NEW_VALUE
columns.Comments: New value represents the new value of what changed attribute.

columns.Name: OPERATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Operation type represents the type of operation committed.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
